nasb.text: “Now men do not see the light which is bright in the skies; But the wind has passed and cleared them.

esv.text: “And now no one looks on the light when it is bright in the skies, when the wind has passed and cleared them.

cnv.text: 人不能看見雲後的強光， 唯有經風一吹，天才晴朗。

ccb.text: 风吹散天空的云后， 无人能仰视太阳的强光。
